name: Credential Exfiltration and Administration Task from the Same User
notes: This rule triggers when a credential exfiltration alert occurs in a short time span before or after an administration task has been observed, which could indicate the attacker made use of their access to the platform.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Credential Exfiltration in Amazon GuardDuty
conditions_text: when all of these BB:BehaviorDefinition: Regular Virtualization Administration, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Credential Exfiltration in Amazon GuardDuty, in any order, from the same username to the same username, over 1800 seconds
TD_list: APPLY Credential Exfiltration and Administration Task from the Same User on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when all of these BB:BehaviorDefinition: Regular Virtualization Administration, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Credential Exfiltration in Amazon GuardDuty, in any order, from the same username  to  the same username, over 1800 seconds
RED_list: Event name: Credential Exfiltration and Administration Task from the Same User
Event description: Detects a credential exfiltration and administration task from the same user.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Username
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
